opinion.p: 549 U. S. ____ (2006) 549 U. S. ____ (2006) 549 U. S. ____ (2006) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES REYMUNDO TOLEDO-FLORES, PETITIONER v. UNITED STATES
on writ of certiorari to the united states court of appeals for the fifth circuit
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
